name: pi-extension-monorepo
description: Monorepo for standalone pi extensions published as separate npm packages.

scripts.verify: pnpm run biome:check && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run test && pnpm run check
scripts.verify:strict: pnpm run biome:strict && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run test && pnpm run check && pnpm run coverage:check
scripts.precommit:strict: pnpm run biome:strict:staged && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run test
scripts.publish:dry-run: pnpm run verify:strict && pnpm -r --filter './packages/*' publish --dry-run --access public --no-git-checks
scripts.publish:all: pnpm run verify:strict && pnpm -r --filter './packages/*' publish --access public --no-git-checks
scripts.publish:ask-user-question: pnpm run verify:strict && pnpm --filter @ryan_nookpi/pi-extension-ask-user-question publish --access public --no-git-checks
scripts.publish:auto-name: pnpm run verify:strict && pnpm --filter @ryan_nookpi/pi-extension-auto-name publish --access public --no-git-checks
scripts.publish:clipboard: pnpm run verify:strict && pnpm --filter @ryan_nookpi/pi-extension-clipboard publish --access public --no-git-checks
scripts.publish:cc-system-prompt: pnpm run verify:strict && pnpm --filter @ryan_nookpi/pi-extension-cc-system-prompt publish --access public --no-git-checks
scripts.publish:codex-fast-mode: pnpm run verify:strict && pnpm --filter @ryan_nookpi/pi-extension-codex-fast-mode publish --access public --no-git-checks
scripts.publish:delayed-action: pnpm run verify:strict && pnpm --filter @ryan_nookpi/pi-extension-delayed-action publish --access public --no-git-checks
scripts.publish:generative-ui: pnpm run verify:strict && pnpm --filter @ryan_nookpi/pi-extension-generative-ui publish --access public --no-git-checks
scripts.publish:idle-screensaver: pnpm run verify:strict && pnpm --filter @ryan_nookpi/pi-extension-idle-screensaver publish --access public --no-git-checks
scripts.publish:todo-write: pnpm run verify:strict && pnpm --filter @ryan_nookpi/pi-extension-todo-write publish --access public --no-git-checks
scripts.publish:until: pnpm run verify:strict && pnpm --filter @ryan_nookpi/pi-extension-until publish --access public --no-git-checks
scripts.publish:claude-hooks-bridge: pnpm run verify:strict && pnpm --filter @ryan_nookpi/pi-extension-claude-hooks-bridge publish --access public --no-git-checks
scripts.publish:claude-mcp-bridge: pnpm run verify:strict && pnpm --filter @ryan_nookpi/pi-extension-claude-mcp-bridge publish --access public --no-git-checks
scripts.publish:cross-agent: pnpm run verify:strict && pnpm --filter @ryan_nookpi/pi-extension-cross-agent publish --access public --no-git-checks
scripts.publish:diff-review: pnpm run verify:strict && pnpm --filter @ryan_nookpi/pi-extension-diff-review publish --access public --no-git-checks
scripts.publish:open-pr: pnpm run verify:strict && pnpm --filter @ryan_nookpi/pi-extension-open-pr publish --access public --no-git-checks
scripts.publish:memory-layer: pnpm run verify:strict && pnpm --filter @ryan_nookpi/pi-extension-memory-layer publish --access public --no-git-checks
